content:
Restyle the ranking popup sheet (_RankingSheet) in lib/screens/users_screen.dart to exactly match the WHO I LIKE page design (lib/screens/who_i_like_screen.dart).

Key design elements to match:
- Background: #0E0E0E
- Title: "RANK YOUR LIKES" in caps, centered, white bold, letterSpacing 1.2
- Subtitle: "Drag to prioritise — #1 is your top pick" in white38, font size 11
- Handle bar: white24 colour
- Each row: large coloured rank number on left using this EXACT colour cycle by index (0-based): [#FFC107, #FF5722, #E91E8C, #00BCD4, #8BC34A, #9C27B0, #03A9F4, #FF9800, #4CAF50, #F44336, #00E5FF, #CDDC39] then repeating
- Then circular avatar (radius 24), then username in white bold 16, age/sex subtitle in white38 size 12
- "New" badge: amber #FFC107 background, black text
- Drag handle: ReorderableDragStartListener wrapping the ENTIRE row (not just the icon), plain Icons.drag_handle icon in white24 on the right
- Thin white10 dividers between rows, no card borders or rounded corners — flat rows like the WIL page
- Row background: #0E0E0E for normal rows, amber #FFC107 at 8% opacity for the new user row
- Save button: #FFC107 amber background, black bold text "SAVE RANKING", full width, height 52

Keep all existing logic (_saving, onSave, scroll to new item, etc) intact.

When done run: openclaw system event --text "Done: ranking popup restyled to match WIL" --mode now

Restyle the ranking popup sheet (_RankingSheet) in lib/screens/users_screen.dart to exactly match the WHO I LIKE page design (lib/screens/who_i_like_screen.dart).

Key design elements to match:
- Background: #0E0E0E
- Title: "RANK YOUR LIKES" in caps, centered, white bold, letterSpacing 1.2
- Subtitle: "Drag to prioritise — #1 is your top pick" in white38, font size 11
- Handle bar: white24 colour
- Each row: large coloured rank number on left using this EXACT colour cycle by index (0-based): [#FFC107, #FF5722, #E91E8C, #00BCD4, #8BC34A, #9C27B0, #03A9F4, #FF9800, #4CAF50, #F44336, #00E5FF, #CDDC39] then repeating
- Then circular avatar (radius 24), then username in white bold 16, age/sex subtitle in white38 size 12
- "New" badge: amber #FFC107 background, black text
- Drag handle: ReorderableDragStartListener wrapping the ENTIRE row (not just the icon), plain Icons.drag_handle icon in white24 on the right
- Thin white10 dividers between rows, no card borders or rounded corners — flat rows like the WIL page
- Row background: #0E0E0E for normal rows, amber #FFC107 at 8% opacity for the new user row
- Save button: #FFC107 amber background, black bold text "SAVE RANKING", full width, height 52

Keep all existing logic (_saving, onSave, scroll to new item, etc) intact.

When done run: openclaw system event --text "Done: ranking popup restyled to match WIL" --mode now

attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, use Config tool.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- less-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (triggers) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/triggers.
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

content.thinking:
Now I have a clear picture of both files. Let me restyle the `_RankingSheet` in `users_screen.dart` to match the WIL design exactly.

Key changes needed:

1. **`_showRankingSheet`**: Change `backgroundColor` to `Color(0xFF0E0E0E)`, remove `shape` (flat top corners)
2. **`_RankingSheetState`**: 
   - Change `_bg` to `Color(0xFF0E0E0E)`, remove `_surface`
   - Add `_rankColors` array
   - Add `_rankColor(int index)` method (0-based index)
3. **`build()`**: Update the handle bar to white24, restyle the title to "RANK YOUR LIKES" in caps with centered white bold text and 1.2 letterSpacing, set subtitle to white38 at size 11, and either remove or keep the divider thin at white10
4. **`itemBuilder`**: Restructure each row to wrap with `ReorderableDragStartListener` and restyle the background to match the WIL tile design with a dark base color and 8% amber tint for new users, remove card borders and rounded corners for flat rows, display a large colored rank number based on the index, use a 24-radius CircleAvatar, style the username in white bold 16 with age/sex in white38 at size 12, add an amber "New" badge with black text, place a drag handle icon on the right in white24, and separate rows with thin white10 dividers
5. **Save button**: Style with amber background, black bold text reading "SAVE RANKING", full width at height 52

Now I'm restructuring the `_RankingSheet` and `_RankingSheetState` classes...

Refactoring the state management... I'm clarifying the spec — the "no card borders or rounded corners" applies specifically to the row styling, not the sheet container itself, so I'll keep the small top radius for better UX while making the rows flat. Now I'm rewriting the `_RankingSheetState` class with the new color scheme and flat row design.

Building the sheet layout... Building the reorderable list items... Building the leaderboard row layout... Building the list item layout...

Now I'm adding a save button at the bottom that's disabled while the save operation is in progress, with styling that adapts to the keyboard height.

I also need to update the `_showRankingSheet` method to use a dark background color and adjust the shape styling for the bottom sheet.

Now I'm identifying the specific lines in the users_screen.dart file that need to be modified: the `_showRankingSheet` method around lines 188-226, the `showModalBottomSheet` call within it, and the `_RankingSheetState` class definition starting at line 593. I'll need to update the static color constants and replace the entire class with the new styling. I'm going to restructure the `_RankingSheetState` class with updated constants and a new build method that uses the dark theme styling and implements the ranking sheet layout with proper spacing and typography.

592	}
593	
594	class _RankingSheetState extends State<_RankingSheet> {
595	  late List<_RankItem> _items;
596	  bool _saving = false;
597	  final ScrollController _scrollController = ScrollController();
598	  final AudioPlayer _audioPlayer = AudioPlayer();
599	  final Map<int, bool> _playing = {};
600	  final Map<int, String?> _voiceUrls = {};
601	
602	  static const _bg = Color(0xFF12121C);
603	  static const _surface = Color(0xFF1E1E2E);
604	
605	  @override
606	  void initState() {
607	    super.initState();
608	    _items = List.from(widget.items);
609	    // Auto-scroll to the new person after the sheet renders
610	    WidgetsBinding.instance.addPostFrameCallback((_) {
611	      final newIndex = _items.indexWhere((i) => i.id == widget.newUserId);
612	      if (newIndex > 0 && _scrollController.hasClients) {
613	        final itemH = 72.0; // approximate row height
614	        _scrollController.animateTo(
615	          newIndex * itemH,
616	          duration: const Duration(milliseconds: 400),
617	          curve: Curves.easeOut,
618	        );
619	      }
620	    });
621	  }
622	
623	  @override
624	  void dispose() {
625	    _audioPlayer.dispose();
626	    _scrollController.dispose();
627	    super.dispose();
628	  }
629	
630	  Future<String?> _fetchVoiceUrl(int userId) async {
631	    try {
632	      final resp = await http.get(
633	        Uri.parse('${widget.baseUrl}/api/like/$userId/voice'),
634	        headers: {
635	          if (widget.token != null) 'Authorization': 'Bearer ${widget.token}',
636	        },
637	      );
638	      if (resp.statusCode == 200) {
639	        final data = jsonDecode(resp.body) as Map<String, dynamic>;
640	        return data['url'] as String?;
641	      }
642	    } catch (_) {}
643	    return null;
644	  }
645	
646	  Future<void> _togglePlay(int userId) async {
647	    if (_playing[userId] == true) {
648	      await _audioPlayer.stop();
649	      setState(() => _playing[userId] = false);
650	      return;
651	    }
652	
653	    if (!_voiceUrls.containsKey(userId)) {
654	      final url = await _fetchVoiceUrl(userId);
655	      setState(() => _voiceUrls[userId] = url);
656	    }
657	
658	    final url = _voiceUrls[userId];
659	    if (url == null) return;
660	
661	    _audioPlayer.onPlayerComplete.listen((_) {
662	      if (mounted) setState(() => _playing[userId] = false);
663	    });
664	
665	    await _audioPlayer.play(UrlSource(url));
666	    setState(() {
667	      for (final k in _playing.keys.toList()) {
668	        _playing[k] = false;
669	      }
670	      _playing[userId] = true;
671	    });
672	  }
673	
674	  @override
675	  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
676	    final screenH = MediaQuery.of(context).size.height;
677	
678	    return Container(
679	      height: screenH * 0.75,
680	      decoration: const BoxDecoration(
681	        color: _bg,
682	        borderRadius: BorderRadius.vertical(top: Radius.circular(20)),
683	      ),
684	      child: Column(
685	        children: [
686	          // Handle
687	          Container(
688	            margin: const EdgeInsets.only(top: 10, bottom: 4),
689	            width: 40,
690	            height: 4,
691	            decoration: BoxDecoration(
692	              color: Colors.grey.shade700,
693	              borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(2),
694	            ),
695	          ),
696	          // Title
697	          const Padding(
698	            padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 12),
699	            child: Text(
700	              'Rank Your Likes',
701	              style: TextStyle(
702	                color: Colors.white,
703	                fontSize: 18,
704	                fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
705	              ),
706	            ),
707	          ),
708	          const Padding(
709	            padding: EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 8),
710	            child: Text(
711	              'Drag to reorder — #1 is your top pick',
712	              style: TextStyle(color: Colors.grey, fontSize: 13),
713	            ),
714	          ),
715	          const Divider(color: Color(0xFF2A2A3E), height: 1),
716	          // Reorderable list
717	          Expanded(
718	            child: ReorderableListView.builder(
719	              scrollController: _scrollController,
720	              padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 6),
721	              itemCount: _items.length,
722	              onReorder: (oldIndex, newIndex) {
723	                setState(() {
724	                  if (newIndex > oldIndex) newIndex--;
725	                  final item = _items.removeAt(oldIndex);
726	                  _items.insert(newIndex, item);
727	                });
728	              },
729	              itemBuilder: (ctx, index) {
730	                final item = _items[index];
731	                final isNew = item.id == widget.newUserId;
732	                final photoUrl =
733	                    '${widget.baseUrl}/api/users/${item.id}/photo';
734	                return ReorderableDragStartListener(
735	                  key: ValueKey(item.id),
736	                  index: index,
737	                  child: Container(
738	                  margin: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(
739	                      horizontal: 12, vertical: 4),
740	                  decoration: BoxDecoration(
741	                    color: isNew
742	                        ? Colors.blueAccent.withOpacity(0.18)
743	                        : _surface,
744	                    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
745	                    border: isNew
746	                        ? Border.all(
747	                            color: Colors.blueAccent.withOpacity(0.5),
748	                            width: 1.5)
749	                        : null,
750	                  ),
751	                  child: ListTile(
752	                    contentPadding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(
753	                        horizontal: 12, vertical: 4),
754	                    leading: Row(
755	                      mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
756	                      children: [
757	                        // Rank badge
758	                        SizedBox(
759	                          width: 28,
760	                          child: Text(
761	                            '#${index + 1}',
762	                            style: const TextStyle(
763	                              color: Colors.blueAccent,
764	                              fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
765	                              fontSize: 14,
766	                            ),
767	                            textAlign: TextAlign.center,
768	                          ),
769	                        ),
770	                        const SizedBox(width: 8),
771	                        // Circular photo
772	                        CircleAvatar(
773	                          radius: 22,
774	                          backgroundColor:
775	                              Colors.blueAccent.withOpacity(0.2),
776	                          child: ClipOval(
777	                            child: Image.network(
778	                              photoUrl,
779	                              width: 44,
780	                              height: 44,
781	                              fit: BoxFit.cover,
782	                              headers: widget.token != null
783	                                  ? {
784	                                      'Authorization':
785	                                          'Bearer ${widget.token}'
786	                                    }
787	                                  : {},
788	                              errorBuilder: (_, __, ___) => Center(
789	                                child: Text(
790	                                  item.username.isNotEmpty
791	                                      ? item.username[0].toUpperCase()
792	                                      : '?',
793	                                  style: const TextStyle(
794	                                    fontSize: 18,
795	                                    fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
796	                                    color: Colors.blueAccent,
797	                                  ),
798	                                ),
799	                              ),
800	                            ),
801	                          ),
802	                        ),
803	                      ],
804	                    ),
805	                    title: Row(
806	                      children: [
807	                        Text(
808	                          item.username,
809	                          style: const TextStyle(
810	                            color: Colors.white,
811	                            fontWeight: FontWeight.w600,
812	                            fontSize: 15,
813	                          ),
814	                        ),
815	                        if (isNew) ...[
816	                          const SizedBox(width: 6),
817	                          Container(
818	                            padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(
819	                                horizontal: 6, vertical: 2),
820	                            decoration: BoxDecoration(
821	                              color: Colors.blueAccent.withOpacity(0.25),
822	                              borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(6),
823	                            ),
824	                            child: const Text(
825	                              'New',
826	                              style: TextStyle(
827	                                color: Colors.blueAccent,
828	                                fontSize: 11,
829	                                fontWeight: FontWeight.w600,
830	                              ),
831	                            ),
832	                          ),
833	                        ],
834	                      ],
835	                    ),
836	                    subtitle: item.age != null
837	                        ? Text(
838	                            '${item.age}${item.sex != null ? ' · ${item.sex}' : ''}',
839	                            style: const TextStyle(
840	                                color: Colors.grey, fontSize: 13),
841	                          )
842	                        : null,
843	                    trailing: const Icon(Icons.drag_indicator, color: Colors.grey),
844	                  ),
845	                  ),
846	                );
847	              },
848	            ),
849	          ),
850	          const Divider(color: Color(0xFF2A2A3E), height: 1),
851	          // Save button

671	  Future<void> _togglePlay(int userId) async {
672	    if (_playing[userId] == true) {
673	      await _audioPlayer.stop();
674	      setState(() => _playing[userId] = false);
675	      return;
676	    }
677	
678	    if (!_voiceUrls.containsKey(userId)) {
679	      final url = await _fetchVoiceUrl(userId);
680	      setState(() => _voiceUrls[userId] = url);
681	    }
682	
683	    final url = _voiceUrls[userId];
684	    if (url == null) return;
685	
686	    await _audioPlayer.play(UrlSource(url));
687	    setState(() {
688	      for (final k in _playing.keys.toList()) {
689	        _playing[k] = false;
690	      }
691	      _playing[userId] = true;
692	    });
693	  }

content.text:
Done. The `_RankingSheet` has been restyled to match the WIL page:

- **Background** `#0E0E0E`, handle bar `white24`
- **Title** `RANK YOUR LIKES` — caps, centered, bold, `letterSpacing: 1.2`
- **Subtitle** `white38`, size 11, updated wording
- **Rows** — flat (no cards/borders), coloured rank numbers cycling through the 12-colour palette, `CircleAvatar` radius 24, username bold/16, age·sex `white38`/12, `white10` dividers
- **"New" badge** — amber `#FFC107` background, black text
- **Drag handle** — `Icons.drag_handle` in `white24` (voice play button preserved to the left of it)
- **Row background** — `#0E0E0E` normal, amber at 8% opacity for the new user
- **Save button** — amber `#FFC107`, black bold `SAVE RANKING`, height 52, full width

All existing audio and save logic is intact.
